reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio en todo sentido: tiempo, calidad, limpieza y orden y una atención al publico cálida y cordial.
Siempre atentos al cliente, cosa que en pocos lugares pasa.
Y muyy bueno el café!☺

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service in every way: punctuality, quality, cleanliness and organization, and warm and friendly customer service.
They're always attentive to the customer, which is rare.
And the coffee is really good! ☺
